title: UK armed forces biannual diversity statistics: October 2025

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: This is a biannual publication containing statistics on diversity declaration and representation of protected characteristics for military personnel employed by the Ministry of Defence.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Diversity statistics replaces a number of previous MOD tri-service publications including the Diversity Dashboard (Military), Annual and Quarterly Personnel Reports, Service Personnel Bulletin 2.01, Annual maternity report and the UK Reserve Forces and Cadets report, which can now be found in this publication.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Accredited official statistics: UK armed forces biannual diversity statistics: October 2025
